chief_complaint: feeling tired all the time for the past month
hpi_details: low energy during the day, finds it hard to get out of bed, going to sleep late because of phone use and waking early. Appetite is normal, mood is a bit low but not sad all day, no weight change, no fever. Drinks three or four cups of coffee a day.
ideas: thinks it is because she is not sleeping well
concerns: worried the tiredness is affecting her work and family
expectations: wants advice on how to get more energy
social_hx: works in an office, two children at home, does not smoke, rarely exercises
learning_objectives: Practise everyday clinical conversation about lifestyle, sleep, and energy
Ask simple lifestyle questions: sleep, caffeine, exercise, daily routine
Use plain, encouraging language when giving advice
Acknowledge the impact of the symptom on the patient's work and family
suggested_questions: How has your sleep been lately?
How many cups of coffee do you drink in a day?
How is the tiredness affecting your work and home life?
Do you get any time to exercise or relax?
